2. **High-frequency nerve stimulation**: The nervous system must be able to stimulate the vocal organs at high frequencies to produce ultrasonic sounds.
3. **Advanced auditory processing**: Animals that perceive ultrasonic sounds must have specialized auditory processing abilities to detect and interpret these high-frequency sounds.
